 0295: # --- Portable LSB and Popcount inline ---
 0296: cdef extern from *:
 0297:     """
 0298:     #ifdef _MSC_VER
 0299:     #include <intrin.h>
 0300:     static __forceinline int _cy_lsb_impl2(unsigned long long bb) {
 0301:         if (!bb) return -1;
 0302:         unsigned long idx;
 0303:         _BitScanForward64(&idx, bb);
 0304:         return (int)idx;
 0305:     }
 0306:     #if defined(_M_AMD64) || defined(_M_ARM64)
 0307:     static __forceinline int _cy_popcount_impl2(unsigned long long bb) {
 0308:         return (int)__popcnt64(bb);
 0309:     }
 0310:     #else
 0311:     static __forceinline int _cy_popcount_impl2(unsigned long long bb) {
 0312:         bb = bb - ((bb >> 1) & 0x5555555555555555ULL);
 0313:         bb = (bb & 0x3333333333333333ULL) + ((bb >> 2) & 0x3333333333333333ULL);
 0314:         return (int)((((bb + (bb >> 4)) & 0xF0F0F0F0F0F0F0FULL) * 0x101010101010101ULL) >> 56);
 0315:     }
 0316:     #endif
 0317:     #else
 0318:     static __inline__ int _cy_lsb_impl2(unsigned long long bb) {
 0319:         if (!bb) return -1;
 0320:         return __builtin_ctzll(bb);
 0321:     }
 0322:     static __inline__ int _cy_popcount_impl2(unsigned long long bb) {
 0323:         return __builtin_popcountll(bb);
 0324:     }
 0325:     #endif
 0326:     """
 0327:     int _cy_lsb_impl2(unsigned long long bb) nogil
